nodes.name: ⚠️ Error Trigger
nodes.notes:
This node fires automatically whenever ANY node in a linked workflow fails.
To link it: open The Daily Director or The Publisher → Settings → Error Workflow → select this workflow.

nodes.name: 📋 Parse Error Details
nodes.notes: Extracts the workflow name, failed node name, error message, and execution URL from the error trigger payload.

nodes.name: 📱 Send Error Alert
nodes.notes: Sends you an immediate Telegram alert with the error details and a direct link to the failed execution so you can debug or retry.

nodes.name: 📊 Log Error to Sheet
nodes.notes:
Logs the error to an 'Error Log' sheet tab in your same Roblox Content Tracker.
Create a new sheet tab called 'Error Log' with columns:
Timestamp | Workflow | Failed Node | Error Message | Execution URL
